title: ModusToolbox Board Support Package
description: Logical structure of a ModusToolbox Board Support Package (TARGET_*) repository, including the development kit metadata, target device, configured peripherals, and bundled design.modus configuration.

id.description: BSP identifier matching the TARGET_* repo name on the Infineon GitHub org.

name.description: Human-readable name of the development kit.

partNumber.description: Marketing part number of the kit, e.g. CY8CKIT-062S2-43012.

mpn.description: Manufacturer part number of the primary MCU on the kit.

connectivity.description: Wireless or wired connectivity components mounted on the BSP (e.g. CYW4343W, CYW43012, CYW55513).

designModusPath.description: Path to the design.modus Device Configurator file shipped with the BSP.

capabilities.description: ModusToolbox capability tags advertised by the BSP, e.g. BSP_DESIGN_MODUS, MCU_CY8C624ABZI_S2D44.
